'''kodhadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zombyish|zombyish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-dh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zombyish|zombyish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kodhadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kodhadithi|kodhadithi]] || [[word:kodhadiji|kodhadiji]] || [[word:kodhadishi|kodhadishi]] || [[word:kodhadiki|kodhadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kodhaduthuthu|kodhaduthuthu]] || [[word:kodhadujuju|kodhadujuju]] || [[word:kodhadushushu|kodhadushushu]] || [[word:kodhadukuku|kodhadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kodhaduthu|kodhaduthu]] || [[word:kodhaduju|kodhaduju]] || [[word:kodhadushu|kodhadushu]] || [[word:kodhaduku|kodhaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kodhadufthuf|kodhadufthuf]] || [[word:kodhadufjuf|kodhadufjuf]] || [[word:kodhadufshuf|kodhadufshuf]] || [[word:kodhadufkuf|kodhadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kodhadethe|kodhadethe]] || [[word:kodhadeje|kodhadeje]] || [[word:kodhadeshe|kodhadeshe]] || [[word:kodhadeke|kodhadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kodhadothotho|kodhadothotho]] || [[word:kodhadojojo|kodhadojojo]] || [[word:kodhadoshosho|kodhadoshosho]] || [[word:kodhadokoko|kodhadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kodhadotho|kodhadotho]] || [[word:kodhadojo|kodhadojo]] || [[word:kodhadosho|kodhadosho]] || [[word:kodhadoko|kodhadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kodhadofthof|kodhadofthof]] || [[word:kodhadofjof|kodhadofjof]] || [[word:kodhadofshof|kodhadofshof]] || [[word:kodhadofkof|kodhadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kodhadïfthïf|kodhadïfthïf]] || [[word:kodhadïfjïf|kodhadïfjïf]] || [[word:kodhadïfshïf|kodhadïfshïf]] || [[word:kodhadïfkïf|kodhadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kodhadïfthïfthïf|kodhadïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:kodhadïfjïfjïf|kodhadïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:kodhadïfshïfshïf|kodhadïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:kodhadïfkïfkïf|kodhadïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kodhadïfthïf|kodhadïfthïf]] || [[word:kodhadïfjïf|kodhadïfjïf]] || [[word:kodhadïfshïf|kodhadïfshïf]] || [[word:kodhadïfkïf|kodhadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kodhadïfthïf|kodhadïfthïf]] || [[word:kodhadïfjïf|kodhadïfjïf]] || [[word:kodhadïfshïf|kodhadïfshïf]] || [[word:kodhadïfkïf|kodhadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kodhadæthæ|kodhadæthæ]] || [[word:kodhadæjæ|kodhadæjæ]] || [[word:kodhadæshæ|kodhadæshæ]] || [[word:kodhadækæ|kodhadækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kodhadathatha|kodhadathatha]] || [[word:kodhadajaja|kodhadajaja]] || [[word:kodhadashasha|kodhadashasha]] || [[word:kodhadakaka|kodhadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kodhadatha|kodhadatha]] || [[word:kodhadaja|kodhadaja]] || [[word:kodhadasha|kodhadasha]] || [[word:kodhadaka|kodhadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kodhadafthaf|kodhadafthaf]] || [[word:kodhadafjaf|kodhadafjaf]] || [[word:kodhadafshaf|kodhadafshaf]] || [[word:kodhadafkaf|kodhadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kodhadasha|kodhadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kodhadshësha|kodhadshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kodhadrosha|kodhadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kodhadmusha|kodhadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kodhadyasha|kodhadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokodhadnkshësha|gokodhadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokodhadnkrosha|gokodhadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokodhadnkmusha|gokodhadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokodhadnkyasha|gokodhadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kodhadhadasha|kodhadhadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kodhadhadshësha|kodhadhadshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kodhadhadrosha|kodhadhadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kodhadhadmusha|kodhadhadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kodhadhadyasha|kodhadhadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokodhadhadnkshësha|gokodhadhadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokodhadhadnkrosha|gokodhadhadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokodhadhadnkmusha|gokodhadhadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokodhadhadnkyasha|gokodhadhadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kedhædasha|kedhædasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kedhædshësha|kedhædshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kedhædrosha|kedhædrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kedhædmusha|kedhædmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kedhædyasha|kedhædyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokedhædnkshësha|gokedhædnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokedhædnkrosha|gokedhædnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokedhædnkmusha|gokedhædnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokedhædnkyasha|gokedhædnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kodhfadasha|kodhfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kodhfadshësha|kodhfadshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kodhfadrosha|kodhfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kodhfadmusha|kodhfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kodhfadyasha|kodhfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokodhfadnkshësha|gokodhfadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokodhfadnkrosha|gokodhfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokodhfadnkmusha|gokodhfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokodhfadnkyasha|gokodhfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
